name: shaper
description: Release shaping before implementation starts for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Shape release-sized work before implementation starts
interface.longDescription: shaper helps maintainers turn raw intent into bounded release plans, appetite, cutlines, no-gos, and handoff guidance before implementation work moves into specs.
defaultPrompt: Shape this raw intent into a release plan
Draw a release cutline across these specs
Check whether this release is ready
